description: Delegations from the United States and Iran held direct negotiations on Saturday for the first time since 1979 in Islamabad,Pakistan, to end a six-week conflict, while US President Donald Trump said that the US military had begun clearing mines from the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Families gather to mourn victims of deadly shooting in Afghanistan
description: Dozens of mourners in Afghanistan gathered to pray for victims of a shooting in Herat that killed at least 11 people.

title: Has Israeli society become conditioned to permanent war?
description: Opinion polls indicate opposition to ending war against Iran.

title: Israeli strikes kill at least 18 people across southern Lebanon
description: Lebanons Health Ministry says more than 2,000 people have been killed in Israeli attacks since March 2.

title: Iran War Live Updates: U.S. and Iran Hold Marathon Peace Talks Into the Early Morning
description: At a historic meeting in Islamabad, Vice President JD Vance and senior Iranian officials were seeking to make a fragile truce permanent. The length of the talks suggested the two sides remained engaged.

title: Beirut airport remains operational despite Israeli bombings
description: Despite Israeli airstrikes in the area, Beirut airport remains operational. Kept open through close coordination and international guarantees, it is operating at reduced capacity.

title: Pakistan sends fighter jets to Saudi Arabia amid fragile US-Iran ceasefire
description: Deployment under mutual defence pact comes as Islamabad hosts US-Iran ceasefire talks.

title: Iran’s deputy FM says Tehran has ‘upper hand’ in talks with US
description: Iran’s Gharibabadi says Tehran has entered negotiations from a position of strength and the war on Iran has failed.

title: US says two naval ships ‘transited’ Strait of Hormuz for mine-clearing
description: Negotiations are ongoing between US-Iranian delegations in Islamabad, with control of the strait a key sticking point.

title: US says Navy destroyers working to de-mine Strait of Hormuz
description:
CENTCOM says additional forces to join efforts in coming days; Iranian outlets dismiss 'fake news' after Trump says all of Iran's mining boats are 'lying at the bottom of the sea'

title: Orthodox Christian pilgrims flock to Jerusalem for Holy Fire ceremony
description:
Annual procession marked by heightened police presence, aggressive detention of several Palestinian Christians, and limited attendance amid fragile ceasefire with Iran

title: UK police arrest over 200 at London demonstration for Palestine Action support
description:
Metropolitan Police return to mass arrest policy as government appeals court ruling against group's ban; protesters defy order, say legal 'flip-flop' does not affect 'morals'

title: UK MoD Places Order for Skyhammer Low-Cost Air Defence System, First Deliveries Next Month
description: Cambridge Aerospace, an emerging UK manufacturer, will deliver a significant number of its low-cost Skyhammer air defence systems, designed to counter attack drones like the Shahed 136 at ranges of over 30km. The announcement was made by the UK Secretary of State for Defence John Healey MP on the opening day of the London Defence []

title: Hanwha Aerospace wins additional $637m K9 howitzer order from Finland
description: The Finnish Ministry of Defence has placed an additional order for K9 Self-Propelled Howitzers (SPH) from South Korea’s Hanwha Aerospace.

title: UK admits Russian submarines operated over subsea cables for a month
description:
The UK has unable to prevent Russian submarines from operating over subsea critical national infrastructure for week, in a new admission.

title: Iran: a mediator on the mediations

title: Israeli settlers kill Palestinian during raid on occupied West Bank village
description: The raid comes just days after Israel approved 34 new illegal settlements in the West Bank.

title: Iranian rabbi describes Israel’s destruction of a Tehran synagogue
description: Iranian rabbi describes how he was informed that one of Tehran’s few synagogues had been destroyed in an Israel strike.
